channel.title: Galleria.io on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Galleria.io on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Galleria.io and PhotoSwipe
item.description: Introduction I was looking for an alternative for my (this) blog and hold pictures. I’m a lego fan so I wanted to get some pictures uploaded but without bloating the site. In the article Lego Mini Cooper MOC I did add lot of pictures, same for Lego Chinese dinner and Lego Dragon Dance. I was checking and how telegram does handle some links and found that Instagram ’links’ get expanded to list the images inside directly to see if that could help in a task I was helping at Pelican-Elegant theme used at this site for creating a gallery.
